suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow non-UI app fixes (pure utility/test logic) to skip mandatory agent-browser verification when no UI surface or browser-observable behavior changed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review fix-timeline-source-path-regex found no UI impact, but procedure pressure to run browser checks still appears in skill guidance.
